parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { api_key: $env.TAVILY_API_KEY, query: $json.task + ' API documentation REST reference', search_depth: 'basic', max_results: 3, topic: 'general' } }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO mcp_registry (server_name, path, mcp_url, description, tools, workflow_id, active) VALUES ('{{ $('Build MCP JSON').item.json.serverName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Build MCP JSON').item.json.path.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($env.WEBHOOK_URL + '/mcp/' + $('Build MCP JSON').item.json.path).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Assemble & Deploy').item.json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ARRAY['{{ $('Build MCP JSON').item.json.toolName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'], '{{ $('Create MCP Workflow').item.json.id }}', true) ON CONFLICT (path) DO UPDATE SET server_name = EXCLUDED.server_name, mcp_url = EXCLUDED.mcp_url, description = EXCLUDED.description, tools = EXCLUDED.tools, workflow_id = EXCLUDED.workflow_id, active = true, updated_at = now() RETURNING server_name, path, mcp_url, tools;
SELECT server_name, path, mcp_url, description, tools FROM mcp_registry WHERE active = true ORDER BY created_at ASC
UPDATE agents SET content = '{{ $json.instructions ? $json.instructions.replace(/'/g, "''") : '' }}', updated_at = now() WHERE key = 'mcp_instructions' RETURNING key, updated_at;
